text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The "OpenAI o3 and o4-mini System Card" is a real document published by OpenAI on April 16, 2025. The exact PDF URL cited (https://cdn.openai.com/pdf/2221c875-02dc-4789-800b-e7758f3722c1/o3-and-o4-mini-system-card.pdf) is confirmed as live and matches both the title and the "OpenAI" authorship. The automated checkers likely failed because this is a non-academic technical report not indexed in standard academic databases.
LINK: https://cdn.openai.com/pdf/2221c875-02dc-4789-800b-e7758f3722c1/o3-and-o4-mini-system-card.pdf
